rulings.Case Title: REZA MOINI NAZERI VS. ALI MOINI NAZERI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss The 1st And 5th Causes Of Action For Failure To Join An Indispensable Party
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 31, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT ALI NAZERI, AKBAR NAZERI Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss The 1st And 5th Causes Of Action For Failure To Join An Indispensable Party is OFF CALENDAR. The Court was informed that the case settled. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BINGSEN LI VS. OCWEN LOAN SERVICING ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Substituting Plaintiff In Interest And Granting Leave To File A Supplemental Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 31, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF BINGSEN LI Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Substituting Plaintiff In Interest And Granting Leave To File A Supplemental Complaint is GRANTED. The required showing under California Code of Civil Procedure section 377.32 has been satisfied.=(501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 31, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF NEW PENN FINANCIAL, LLC. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Dismissal Of Does 1-2; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Deborah A. Boyd In Support is GRANTED. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LYNN R. FRANK VS. JEREMY LEE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 31, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF LYNN FRANK Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees is CONTINUED to February 20, 2020, to allow Defendant to provide courtesy copies in compliance with Local Rule 2.7(B). =(501/CFH)
